idea.title: Tier-1 Hook
idea.hook: Assemble a global-market store page from cards — title, screenshot, tag, first-frame — and beat the AI buyer panel.
idea.hook_ru: Собери глобальную страницу игры из карт — заголовок, скриншот, тег, первый кадр — и одолей панель ИИ-покупателей.
idea.prototype: Card-drafting layout: 4 slots (title/screenshot/tag/first-frame). Each slot offers 3 cards/turn with global-appeal scores (hidden until played). Pick one per slot over 4 turns. After lock-in, 5 AI 'buyer' avatars from different regions (West, East Asia, LatAm, India, Russia) react with thumbs up/down based on summed per-card appeal. Score = thumbs-up count. Lose = <2 thumbs-up. Daily seed = different card pool drawn from a 7-card-per-slot library.
idea.mutation_of: Card drafting + reveal-on-commit reaction. Hits Tier-1-thinking signal — build for global markets early, not just home market.
idea.why_novel: Self-aware meta-game: the player IS the launch strategist. Reveal-on-commit + 5-axis regional taste vectors create a multi-objective puzzle that's not yet shipped in casual HTML5. Daily seed makes scores sharable. Pressure is move-budget + score-floor, not a timer.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Pick budget (4 picks total, exactly one per slot) + score threshold (≥2 of 5 thumbs-up)
idea.lose_condition: After 4 picks locked, fewer than 2 of 5 buyer avatars give thumbs-up (turn >= MAX_TURNS && thumbsUp < WIN_THUMBS)

sources.title: Tier-1 Hook
sources.snippet: Entry #5 — Tier-1 Hook: card-drafting layout, 4 slots (title/screenshot/tag/first-frame), 5 AI buyer avatars from different regions react with thumbs up/down. Daily seed.

sources.title: Tier-1 thinking should influence prototypes early
sources.snippet: Market/monetization signal #1: the mistake is building for only the market/language you personally read. Hooks, title, screenshots, and first 20 seconds should work globally. For every prototype, write an English title, one-line hook, and 3 screenshot captions before coding too much.

sources.title: Tier-1 thinking signal cluster
sources.snippet: Market/Monetization Signals — 'Tier-1 thinking should influence prototypes early': hooks, title, screenshots, first 20s should work globally. Sources: spacewolfblog/11981.

synthesizer_brief: Card-drafting puzzle about global-market launch packaging. 4 slots × 3 card offers × 5 regional buyer panels with hidden per-card appeal vectors. Win condition: 2 of 5 thumbs-up after 4 locks. Daily seed rotates the 12-card pool. Self-aware mini-game disguised as a draft — players feel the multi-objective tension of Tier-1 launch strategy without the meta-game being explicit.

alternatives.title: Token Triage
alternatives.hook: Drag AI requests into Haiku/Sonnet/Opus lanes before the budget bar empties
alternatives.why_novel: Real-time tiered cost economy from agent-cost signal

alternatives.title: Satisfying Cleaning
alternatives.hook: Scrub a grimy room tile-by-tile with a dwindling soap meter
alternatives.why_novel: Tile-grid scrubbing with refill-token resource scarcity

alternatives.title: Editor Agent
alternatives.hook: Place AI agents on a scene grid to auto-fix bugs before queue overflows
alternatives.why_novel: Spreading-hazard + tiered-agent placement on Unity editor signal

alternatives.title: Difficulty Curve
alternatives.hook: Drag tower-defense waves up or down to keep the fun-meter inside a moving target band
alternatives.why_novel: Meta-puzzle about being the level designer, with band-reveal-on-touch information drip
